title: commelinantia pringlei
intro: Commelinantia pringlei, also known as Mexican mint or Mexican broomstick, is a flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Commelinantia pringlei include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Commelinantia pringlei can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
